execute_steps: code_review: 验证 update case 中 allCompleted = todos.every(t => t.status === 'completed') 时设置 allCompletedAtCount = userMessageCount
code_review: 验证 before_agent_start 中条件 userMessageCount - allCompletedAtCount >= AUTO_CLEAR_DELAY_ROUNDS (2)
trace: add 3 todos → update #1 completed → update #2 completed → update #3 completed (allCompletedAtCount = N) → agent_start N+1 (diff=1, skip) → agent_start N+2 (diff=2, trigger clear)
确认清空后 todos=[], nextId=1, allCompletedAtCount=null, refreshDisplay(ctx) 被调用
test_execution.evidence: auto-clear 逻辑推演正确，>= 2 在第 2 轮触发清空

execute_steps: code_review: 验证 add case 中 allCompletedAtCount = null 重置逻辑
trace: 全部完成 (allCompletedAtCount=N) → 1 消息 → add 新 todo (allCompletedAtCount=null) → 2 消息 → before_agent_start 检查 allCompletedAtCount===null, 跳过清空
确认列表仍包含新添加的 todo
test_execution.evidence: add 操作正确重置 allCompletedAtCount=null，阻断自动清空

execute_steps: code_review: 验证 before_agent_start 第 3 分支条件 todos.length > 0 && allCompletedAtCount === null && diff >= TODO_REMINDER_INTERVAL (10)
trace: add 2 todos (lastTodoCallCount=N) → 10 次 agent_start (userMessageCount=N+10) → before_agent_start 检查 N+10-N=10 >= 10, 触发
确认返回 customType='todo-reminder', display=false
test_execution.evidence: reminder 条件正确，10 轮后触发

execute_steps: code_review: 验证 executeTodoAction 入口 lastTodoCallCount = userMessageCount
trace: add 2 todos (lastTodoCallCount=N) → 8 消息 → todo list (lastTodoCallCount=N+8) → 9 消息 → diff=9 < 10, 不触发 → 1 消息 → diff=10 >= 10, 触发
确认调用 todo 后计数重置，需要再等 10 轮才触发
test_execution.evidence: lastTodoCallCount 正确重置，计数窗口从调用点重新计算

execute_steps: code_review: 验证 nudge 条件 allCompletedAtCount !== null && todos.length >= VERIFICATION_NUDGE_THRESHOLD (3) && !todos.some(/verif|验证/i)
trace: add 3 todos（无验证关键词） → 全部 completed → before_agent_start 检查 allCompletedAtCount!=null, length=3>=3, 无匹配 → 触发 nudge
确认返回 customType='todo-verification-nudge', display=false, lastReminderCount 更新
test_execution.evidence: nudge 条件正确触发，无验证关键词时生效

execute_steps: code_review: 验证 /verif|验证/i.test(t.text) 正则匹配
trace: add 4 todos（1 个含 '验证'） → 全部 completed → before_agent_start 检查 todos.some() 返回 true → !true = false, 跳过 nudge
确认存在验证关键词时不触发 nudge
test_execution.evidence: 正则匹配 /verif|验证/i 正确识别验证步骤

execute_steps: code_review: 验证 VERIFICATION_NUDGE_THRESHOLD = 3
trace: add 2 todos → 全部 completed → before_agent_start 检查 todos.length=2 < 3, 跳过 nudge
确认少于 3 个任务时不触发
test_execution.evidence: 阈值 3 正确，2 个任务不触发 nudge

execute_steps: code_review: 验证 reconstructState 重置 userMessageCount=0, allCompletedAtCount=null, lastTodoCallCount=0, lastReminderCount=0
code_review: 验证 todos 从 session entries 恢复（遍历 entries 找 toolResult + toolName==='todo'）
code_review: 验证 nextId 从 details.nextId 或 Math.max(ids)+1 恢复
确认重启后提醒状态归零，todo 列表从持久化数据恢复
test_execution.evidence: reconstructState 正确重置 v3 状态，todos 从 entries 恢复
